depression.description: I constantly feel anxious about my finances, especially when I see my bank balance drop unexpectedly. It makes me question my responsibility and whether I'm just failing like my friend's husband.
I feel so drained by the expectations of my friends, especially at the upcoming convention. I worry that I won't be able to meet their needs while managing my own stress.
There are days when I just feel like I'm unlovable. I think about how I might be pushing people away because I don't believe they truly want me around.
I've been avoiding social situations, especially visits from my parents, because I feel overwhelmed. I just can't handle the emotional demands right now.
I find it really hard to say no to my friends when they need me. I feel like I have to be available for them, but it often leaves me feeling empty and unhappy.

Delusion.topic: Fear of being seen as irresponsible
Delusion.description: I worry that if I don’t have a financial cushion, people will think I’m irresponsible. It’s hard to shake that feeling, especially when I compare myself to others.
I often feel like I need to earn my friends' approval by being there for them, even when I'm struggling myself. It’s like my worth is tied to how much I can help others.
